title: All The Pedru
description: Modpack created to be played live with subscribers. twitch.tv/pedruhb (project name is atm parody)
body:
Recommend 6-8 GB of Ram to run

 

The goal of all of pedru is unlock project e for extended play
No grinding, just fun

 

Quests in portuguese, to be used as short guide with good rewards.

 

Magic mods include just Botania and Ars Nouveau.

Tech mods include: ae2, refined storage, create, mekanism, draconic, rftools and more..
Tools/armor mods include: tinkers, constructs armory, silent gear, mystical agriculture and more...

 

NO WORLD BIOME CHANGES!

 

can you watch me playing -> twitch.tv/pedruhb
